title: Winter Griffin can reroll one Hit die and one Atk die once per battle

card.rawText: Once per battle, this creature may re-roll 1 of its Atk Dice Rolls and 1 of its Hit Dice Rolls.

effect.value: Once per battle, this creature may re-roll 1 of its Atk Dice Rolls and 1 of its Hit Dice Rolls.

plan.title: Winter Griffin can reroll one Hit die and one Atk die once per battle
plan.summary: Run a battle with Winter Griffin and verify the reroll-dice route is exposed for both hit and attack dice.

notes: Read text first: Once per battle, this creature may re-roll 1 of its Atk Dice Rolls and 1 of its Hit Dice Rolls.

manualVerification: A red result means the once-per-battle reroll option still needs a dedicated runtime path.
riskNotes: Fixture is scoped to the deterministic headless route; red results should identify missing runtime support or assertion drift.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run a battle with Winter Griffin and verify the reroll-dice route is exposed for both hit and attack dice.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
